calendar.matters:
Compromise Of Claim For Incompetent Person In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of Claim for Incompetent Person hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR. Kent Gubbine
Appearances:
Paul V. Melodia, Esq. for Petitioner/Conservator/Spouse: Teresa Genato present for Louis Genato, Claimant. Petitioner was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise of the claim for incompetent person to be used for an annuity as set forth in the petition, as follows:
Compromise: $1,250,000.00
Reimbursement of Costs to attorneys: $20,511.54
Attorney's fees: $236,734.94
Of the compromise amount $757,300.00 will be used to purchase an annuity through New York Life Insurance Co. which will pay $5,000.00 per month for the life of Louis Genato, guaranteed for eight years, commencing Oct. 15, 2003.
The remaining $235,452.52 will be paid to the Louis Genato Personal Injury Settlement Trust.
Petitioner's counsel to submit Dr. Munday's file as an attachment to a supplemental declaration.
Order signed in open court.
